description:
Capabilities for all dynamically created phase windows and overlays.

All phase-managed windows get the Tauri label 'phase-{id}' (e.g.
'phase-ingame-overlay', 'phase-lobby-win').  The glob pattern 'phase-*'
matches all of them with a single capability entry.

'core:default' grants invoke(), event listen/emit, and core window APIs.
